(fig.1: Lexie Having Fun)

___/SPECS\______________________
Aliases: Lexie, Shoe, Cuppy, Cuppydog
Species: Uncertain
NFPA Rating: 2-0-1-RAD
Bouba/Kiki: Bouba
Voice Actor: Benjamin Reichwald
Genetic Sequence (Excerpt): CGATTTATA
Soul Texture: Sticky
Primary Coping Mechanism: Tuoys
Secondary Coping Mechanism: Extreme Violence
Vibrational Frequency: 100Hz
Social Link: Temperance
Type: Ghost/Electric
Filetype: .FLAC
Movement: Romanticism/Art Nouveau
Movement: Quake

___/OBSESSIONS\_________________
Favourite Colour: Orange (NOT a nationalist)
Interesting Thing: Skin-on-skin contact
Absolute Kino: The Devils (1971)
Current Noise Of Interest: "Shtabil"
Zaddies: Doré, Klimt, Muscha, Vrubel

Whoa!!!!!!!!!!!! Hello!!!!!!!!!!!!

My name is Alexandria but most people call me Lexie, this is my little 'hub' where I have my links and projects and blog and such things that bring me a big big smile.

I primarily make games and things related to games, like asset packs and tools! You can find all of that to the right under 'workz' and more about me here!

My constant when it comes to the stuff I make is that I like to craft stories. Making people care/laugh/cry/angry with my games is so so so pawesome.

My current main project is aimed at facillitating the telling of stories though, through a semi-game engine of my own making. It's going to be super fucking cool just trust me bro.

My non-work related hobbies primarily consist of watching movies and building gunpla. Qubeley is my favourite mobile suit and so far I've managed to find and build the HG, HG Mk.2, HG Mk.2 red, and MG kits! Besides that hobbies come and go often, which is arguably awesome and kind of ideal for something low-stakes like that.

Feel free to reach out thru my socials or add me on pisscorp <3

DVD
BREAKING NEWS: Local cuppydog has been sighted eating an aluminum can, more on this story at 9 | 500 burglar clowns have been apprehended in what has been dubbed "The Greatest Traffic Stop" | "I feel neglected" - Lady Death comes out against retired genocidal maniac | Qubeley voted 'coolest most awesome gundam' by a margin of 90%, experts are unsurprised | World peace has been postponed - "Suffering builds character" says expert | Florida gatorgirl CLAMPS DOWN on transphobia, everyone cheers |

Trinkets and Relics



☰ Flesh and Pressure

A visual novel about a lovesick girl and her trash compactor, and the relationship blossoming between them.

☰ The Anders Cyclopaedia

A game about exploring and compiling the wilderness of a parallel universe.

Currently only a demo version is available, progress is slow and might halt in the near future.

☰ ONEIRO(PHOBIA/PHRENIA)

A game about dreams, through the 4:3 lens of a CRT TV.

☰ DRAAD

A point-and-click adventure, currently being worked on.

Not much to show yet apart from the repository, maybe more soon!

☰ Recurse() { Recurse(); Recurse(); }

A web-based fractal drawing toy, comprised out of divs and using CSS for styling purposes!

Printing repeatedly onto the same paper encouraged, makes for beautiful graphics and very hot CPUs.

Various Other Projects:

The Well ✩ Critter Crafter ✩ Pop-Up Collage Maker ✩ Pop-Up Princess ✩ T4 Assessment ✩ Divvy Sprout! ✩ Webby Sprouts! ✩ Sierpinski Doubt! ✩ Interview With A Tool - Godot ✩
